title: Training and Deploying Predictive Models
subtitle: GBC Pipeline with StandardScaler, /analyze Endpoint, SL/TP from ATR, 72.88% Win Rate
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT — /analyze response format (signal+sl+tp+conf), ATR-based SL/TP from ML output, 72.88% win rate on Boom 1000, probability threshold pattern. Architecture is fully Python-native (no bridge needed for our system).

signal_output.conf_threshold: signal fires if max(Pbuy, Psell) > threshold

keep: ATR×1 SL, ATR×2 TP from ML output — RRR=2.0 baseline
Confidence score in signal output (0-1) — maps to our position size factor
TimeSeriesSplit for financial data (no data leakage across time)
Minimum 400 rows for training — calibrates data requirement
discard: 60-bar buffer size (too small for our 360-bar M1 window)
improve: Use conf score to scale position size: conf > 0.9 = full size, conf 0.7-0.9 = 75%, conf < 0.7 = skip
Add our gate chain as features: all 5 gates as binary features → ML learns which combinations matter most
